item.title: When is the next results date for Omnitech Engg.?
item.description: Omnitech Engg. will announce its results on 14 March 2026. Time: Mar 12 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd, a micro-cap stock in the miscellaneous sector, has recorded a new all-time low price of Rs.55.5 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid a persistent downward trend over recent weeks. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind broader market indices and its sector peers, reflecting ongoing pressures in its trading activity and valuation metrics. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:42 PM IST

item.title: Amanta Healthcare Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Persistent Market Pressures
item.description: Shares of Amanta Healthcare Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, declined to a fresh all-time low of Rs.93.25 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s downward trajectory. This new 52-week low reflects ongoing pressures despite some positive quarterly financial indicators, with the stock underperforming its sector and broader market indices over multiple time frames. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:42 PM IST

item.title: All Time Plastics Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of All Time Plastics Ltd, a small-cap player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, declined sharply to an all-time low of Rs.205 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s recent performance. This drop comes after a series of negative returns across multiple time frames, reflecting a challenging market environment for the company. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:41 PM IST

item.title: Adcounty Media India Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Decline
item.description: Adcounty Media India Ltd has reached a new all-time low of Rs.97.95 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames, reflecting a sustained period of price erosion despite some positive financial indicators. item.title: Odigma Consultancy Solutions Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend

item.title: Arkade Developers Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Arkade Developers Ltd, a small-cap player in the realty sector, recorded a new all-time low of Rs.103 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. item.title: Raymond Lifestyle Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Raymond Lifestyle Ltd’s shares plunged to a new all-time low of Rs. 776 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended period of decline. The company’s stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within the garments and apparels industry and the firm’s financial trajectory. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:40 PM IST

item.title: Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, recorded a new all-time low of Rs.105 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its recent price trajectory. Despite a modest 1.88% gain on the day, the stock remains under pressure, reflecting a sustained bearish trend and underperformance relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:39 PM IST

item.title: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd has reached a new all-time low of Rs.114.05 on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Hotels & Resorts sector. The stock’s performance continues to trail key benchmarks, with a sustained bearish technical outlook and a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:39 PM IST

item.description: Shares of Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd, a small-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, have plunged to a new all-time low of Rs. 98.8 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended decline. item.title: Unipro Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs.24.85, Marking a Significant Milestone
item.description: Unipro Technologies Ltd has reached a new all-time high of Rs.24.85 on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting a remarkable rally that has seen the stock gain over 50% in the past 21 trading sessions. This milestone underscores the company’s strong market performance amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: Mar 12 2026 08:37 PM IST
